name: Gold Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:15
1. Cream the butter until smooth.
2. Add lemon rind, if desired, and beat well.
3. Gradually add sugar, beating at medium speed after each addition.
4. Add egg yolks one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
5. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt.
6. Alternately add the dry mixture and milk to the butter mixture, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients. Mix well after each addition.
7. Pour batter evenly into two greased and floured 9-inch round cake pans.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 to 30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Allow cakes to cool in pans for 10 minutes before removing them completely onto wire racks.
10. Spread Seven-Minute Frosting between layers and over the top and sides of the cake.
11. Lightly sprinkle the coconut on top and sides.
12. Serve as desired.
